The available options are: As soon as possible or When all products are ready.

relations.evidence: Once all the necessary fields and tabs have been configured, it is time to send the quotation to the customer for confirmation.
Upon confirmation, the quotation turns into an official sales order.
Upon confirmation, the quotation turns into an official sales order.
This button only appears if the *Pro-Forma Invoice* setting has been enabled.
If the *Lock Confirmed Sales* setting is enabled, the sales order becomes Locked, and is indicated as such on the sales order form.
the quotation has been confirmed, turned into a sales order, and is now ready to be invoiced and paid for.
